texts.label: text
texts.orig: Established in December 2013, Eseriani, which means 'Place of peace' in the Maasai language, is a boutique hotel situated in Naivasha within the tranquil Rift Valley.
texts.text: Established in December 2013, Eseriani, which means 'Place of peace' in the Maasai language, is a boutique hotel situated in Naivasha within the tranquil Rift Valley.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: With 20 modern well designed rooms, conference rooms with modern state of the art facilities and an urban restaurant, the Hotel is bound to meet the needs of every guest, whether on business, leisure or travel.
texts.text: With 20 modern well designed rooms, conference rooms with modern state of the art facilities and an urban restaurant, the Hotel is bound to meet the needs of every guest, whether on business, leisure or travel.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Hotel has 16 Deluxe suites, 2 Twin suites and 2 Executive suites. All rooms are fitted with 32 inch TV sets where residents can access 10 satellite channels. There is high speed wifi accessible in all rooms.
texts.text: The Hotel has 16 Deluxe suites, 2 Twin suites and 2 Executive suites. All rooms are fitted with 32 inch TV sets where residents can access 10 satellite channels. There is high speed wifi accessible in all rooms.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Room safes for guest use and convenience

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our Restaurant serves sumptuous meals picked from either a wide á la carte menu or buffet.
texts.text: Our Restaurant serves sumptuous meals picked from either a wide á la carte menu or buffet.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Beautifully set and with warm staff attending to all customer requests, we guarantee top notch service at all times. The restaurant also has a well stocked in-house bar with a choice of alcoholic and non alcoholic drinks and cocktails prepared by our specialist mixologist. texts.label: text
texts.orig: Set in a serene and quiet environment, Eseriani The Hotel guarantees peace of mind and ultimate relaxation to all guests.
texts.text: Set in a serene and quiet environment, Eseriani The Hotel guarantees peace of mind and ultimate relaxation to all guests.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Residents can relax in the carefully planned private gardens adjoining the rooms and enjoy room service from our dedicated and helpful staff.
texts.text: Residents can relax in the carefully planned private gardens adjoining the rooms and enjoy room service from our dedicated and helpful staff.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Whether small or large groups, our 120 seater hall  is an ideal venue for meetings, workshops, seminars, trainings or other corporate functions.
texts.text: Whether small or large groups, our 120 seater hall  is an ideal venue for meetings, workshops, seminars, trainings or other corporate functions.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We also have well manicured gardens for team building activities.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We offer catering services for corporate events, private parties, weddings and cocktails. We are able to offer competitively priced packages for any client's menu of choice.
